entry_point.FQNAME: dev.brahmkshatriya.echo.extension.DeezerApi java.lang.Object lyrics(java.lang.String id, kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super kotlinx.serialization.json.JsonObject> $completion)

problem.problem_class: Multi-dollar interpolation can be used in string literals
problem.description: An interpolation prefix can simplify the string
